news_title: AI Tool Helps Nurses Prioritize Patient Care
summary: A new AI-based system helps hospital staff identify urgent patient needs more quickly by analyzing patient data and alerts.
why_it_matters: This could help reduce response time, support nurses during busy shifts, and improve patient safety.

news_title: Hospitals Increase Focus on Patient Data Protection
summary: Healthcare organizations are improving security practices to protect electronic health records and sensitive patient information.
why_it_matters: Strong cybersecurity is important because healthcare systems store private patient data and are often targets for cyberattacks.

news_title: Telehealth Platforms Add Remote Monitoring Features
summary: New telehealth tools allow patients to share basic health data with providers between visits.
why_it_matters: Remote monitoring can help providers follow patient progress earlier and may reduce unnecessary in-person visits.

summary: New wearable devices can help care teams monitor basic health signals remotely.
why_it_matters: This may help hospitals identify patient changes earlier and support follow-up care.
